This plant was planted by me as a seed, 23 years ago!  However, my family moved away from this property and it is now a rental.  Ask tenants to access this beauty. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
White seedless grapes hanging over cement wall on north side of Antelope drive just as you go up the hill Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: August-August.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

Grapes hang over my fence. Anything facing the street is fair game. You might also be able to pick some pears. Hopefully the neighborhood kids didn't eat all of them before you get there. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
